rulings.Case Title: MAZZOLA VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Judgment Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION MARKET SHARE DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION NEGLIGENCE, STRICT PRODUCT LIABILITY, FALSE REPRESENTATION, AND INTENTIONAL TORT GRANTED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: CAREY VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. No triable issue of fact re exposure or market share. Burden shifts on Plaintiff's admissions that he did not remember any of the manufacturers or suppliers of the brakes that he removed or installed, response to UMF 9 and UMF 14; and on Plaintiff's admission that he has not defined the relevant market, UMF 18; and that he has no evidence to support the contention that he has joined a substantial share of the market, UMF 21. Plaintiff may not rely on his own pleadings to support or oppose a motion for summary judgment or summary adjudication. See College Hosp., Inc. v. Sup.Ct. (Crowell) (1994) 8 Cal.4th 704, 720. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: MERRILL VS UNIVERSITY OF PHOENIX
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE BREACH OF CONTRACT. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: JUDD VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION MARKET SHARE DENIED. FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. NO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION DENIED. PLAINTIFF NEVER ASKED ABOUT MAREMONT BRAKES OR BRAKE LINING. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: BALLEW VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC*
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES NOT ATTACHED. IN ADDITION RESPONSES NOT FACTUALLY DEVOID. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: CALDWELL VS DICK BRUHN INC
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANTS TURNER AND BRUHN INDIVIDUALLY GRANTED - NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXTREME AND OUTRAGEOUS BEHAVIOR OUTSIDE SCOPE OF PERSONAL DECISION AND CONDUCT NECESSARY FOR JOB. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION BY BRUHN INC. GRANT BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING. GRANT NIED NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION. DENY IIED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CAUSED BY FAILURE TO PROMPTLY PAY WAGES. DENY RE MITIGATION OF DAMAGES. DENY SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. (CW)
